texto: Unconditional Love is a perpetual emotion machine. It inspires us to include others. The longer I am bathed in its radiance, the more I find myself looking at others with an open heart. I can look past their faults and love them. I can say, “I may not like the things you do, but I love you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rosa Marchisella: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Unconditional Love is a perpetual emotion machine. It inspires us to include others. The longer I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, emotions, faults pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e faults.
